markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Evaluate GrowthX's AI content service for Tines's scaling needs.](https://fathom.video/share/Psv63FnT4sTdWDd6o8zyy_QyxQZxAg7c?tab=summary&timestamp=78.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Problem:** Tines's content team is resource-strapped, limiting its ability to produce discoverable SEO/AEO content and technical practitioner guides.](https://fathom.video/share/Psv63FnT4sTdWDd6o8zyy_QyxQZxAg7c?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)
  - [**Solution:** GrowthX offers a managed service using proprietary AI workflows and human experts to produce high-quality content at scale (5 articles/week).](https://fathom.video/share/Psv63FnT4sTdWDd6o8zyy_QyxQZxAg7c?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
  - [**Key Use Case:** Enriching Tines's "Story Library" with discoverable content to address its current technical SEO blockers (e.g., non-crawlable pop-out UI).](https://fathom.video/share/Psv63FnT4sTdWDd6o8zyy_QyxQZxAg7c?tab=summary&timestamp=503.0)
  - [**Partnership Model:** A low-bandwidth, two-phase engagement. Phase 1 (8 weeks) focuses on quality and strategy, producing \>10 articles to prove value before a larger commitment.](https://fathom.video/share/Psv63FnT4sTdWDd6o8zyy_QyxQZxAg7c?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)

## Topics

### Tines's Content Challenges

  - [The team is resource-strapped, struggling to meet internal requests from growth marketing, product marketing, and customer advocacy.](https://fathom.video/share/Psv63FnT4sTdWDd6o8zyy_QyxQZxAg7c?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)
  - [**Primary Gaps:**](https://fathom.video/share/Psv63FnT4sTdWDd6o8zyy_QyxQZxAg7c?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
      - [**Discoverability Content:** SEO and AEO (AI Search Engine Optimization) efforts have been under-resourced and have not yielded desired results.](https://fathom.video/share/Psv63FnT4sTdWDd6o8zyy_QyxQZxAg7c?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
      - [**Technical/Practitioner Content:** The team lacks capacity to create content for a new go-to-market motion targeting builders and practitioners.](https://fathom.video/share/Psv63FnT4sTdWDd6o8zyy_QyxQZxAg7c?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
  - [**Strategic Opportunity:** Tines's "Story Library" is a rich asset but is not discoverable due to technical SEO blockers (e.g., non-crawlable pop-out UI). GrowthX could help enrich these pages with content to drive traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/Psv63FnT4sTdWDd6o8zyy_QyxQZxAg7c?tab=summary&timestamp=503.0)

### GrowthX's Solution & Platform

  - [GrowthX provides a managed service combining proprietary AI workflows with human experts ("experts in the loop").](https://fathom.video/share/Psv63FnT4sTdWDd6o8zyy_QyxQZxAg7c?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
  - [**Service Scope:**](https://fathom.video/share/Psv63FnT4sTdWDd6o8zyy_QyxQZxAg7c?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
      - [End-to-end content creation: strategy, production, publishing, and LLM visibility monitoring (via Scrunch or GrowthX's own platform).](https://fathom.video/share/Psv63FnT4sTdWDd6o8zyy_QyxQZxAg7c?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
      - [Focus on editorial and programmatic content (guides, comparisons, how-tos), not custom case studies or social posts.](https://fathom.video/share/Psv63FnT4sTdWDd6o8zyy_QyxQZxAg7c?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
  - [**Platform Overview:**](https://fathom.video/share/Psv63FnT4sTdWDd6o8zyy_QyxQZxAg7c?tab=summary&timestamp=1004.0)
      - [**Artifacts:** A "Content OS" is built from Tines's brand docs, product marketing materials, and a product deep dive. This creates a knowledge base for the AI workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/Psv63FnT4sTdWDd6o8zyy_QyxQZxAg7c?tab=summary&timestamp=1106.0)
      - [**Pipelines:** Custom workflows use multiple LLMs (Claude, OpenAI, Gemini) and research tools (Exa, Tavli) to automate content creation.](https://fathom.video/share/Psv63FnT4sTdWDd6o8zyy_QyxQZxAg7c?tab=summary&timestamp=1004.0)
      - [**Human Checkpoints:** Editors are notified of fact-checking flags and review all drafts, using the platform to make edits and generate suggestions based on the artifacts.](https://fathom.video/share/Psv63FnT4sTdWDd6o8zyy_QyxQZxAg7c?tab=summary&timestamp=1586.0)
      - [**Brand Compliance:** Image generation is fine-tuned to brand kits; GrowthX can also handle staging and publishing directly in the CMS.](https://fathom.video/share/Psv63FnT4sTdWDd6o8zyy_QyxQZxAg7c?tab=summary&timestamp=1734.0)

### Partnership Model & Team

  - [The engagement is structured in two phases to de-risk the partnership:](https://fathom.video/share/Psv63FnT4sTdWDd6o8zyy_QyxQZxAg7c?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
      - [**Phase 1 (8 weeks):** Focuses on quality and strategy. Produces \>10 articles to demonstrate value and build a content roadmap.](https://fathom.video/share/Psv63FnT4sTdWDd6o8zyy_QyxQZxAg7c?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
      - [**Phase 2 (12 months):** Scales production to 5 articles/week (net new or refresh).](https://fathom.video/share/Psv63FnT4sTdWDd6o8zyy_QyxQZxAg7c?tab=summary&timestamp=966.0)
  - [**Team & Bandwidth:**](https://fathom.video/share/Psv63FnT4sTdWDd6o8zyy_QyxQZxAg7c?tab=summary&timestamp=2331.0)
      - [**Phase 1 Team:** Senior-level engagement managers (e.g., former directors of organic growth, heads of growth) with deep content expertise.](https://fathom.video/share/Psv63FnT4sTdWDd6o8zyy_QyxQZxAg7c?tab=summary&timestamp=2331.0)
      - [**Client Bandwidth:** Designed to be low. Requires one primary approver for priorities and drafts. Jason noted this is not a concern, especially with a new hire joining in the next 4–6 weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/Psv63FnT4sTdWDd6o8zyy_QyxQZxAg7c?tab=summary&timestamp=2493.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler:** Send Tines examples of longer-form guides and a workshop from GrowthX's CEO, Marcel, on AI search.](https://fathom.video/share/Psv63FnT4sTdWDd6o8zyy_QyxQZxAg7c?tab=summary&timestamp=2606.0)
  - [**Jason & Mark:** Discuss internal sequencing and timeline for a potential engagement during their Tuesday 1-on-1.](https://fathom.video/share/Psv63FnT4sTdWDd6o8zyy_QyxQZxAg7c?tab=summary&timestamp=2627.0)
  - [**Mark:** Follow up with Tyler after the internal discussion to confirm next steps and whether Kelly needs a separate demo.](https://fathom.video/share/Psv63FnT4sTdWDd6o8zyy_QyxQZxAg7c?tab=summary&timestamp=2627.0)
